name: Galenfeha, Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1 DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Galenfeha was incorporated on March 14, 2013 in the state of Nevada. Our corporate office is located at 420 Throckmorton Street, Suite 200, Ft. Worth Texas 76102, and our telephone number is 1-817-945-6448. Our website is www.galenfeha.com. On January 29, 2018, the Company entered into a Definitive Agreement to acquire Fleaux Solutions, LLC for a cash purchase of $1.00.
